info.title: wfont
info.description: Tool to turn font files into archives that can be read by Walgelijk

options.name: --input
options.description: Path to input file or directory [default: .]

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to output file. Does nothing if the input is a directory. []

options.name: --charset
options.description: Path to text file containing all to-be-encoded characters. ASCII by default. []

options.name: --font-size
options.description: Font size to render the font with. Effectively determines bitmap resolution. [default: 48]
